graded.rationale: Discriminated State/Event types and pure evolve. Bug: hardcodes prices (event.quantity*100 on add, sku==='A'?100:0 on remove) instead of carrying price in the event. Structural correctness but poor modelling.
Decider with decide/evolve/initial, discriminated commands/events. Collapses deposit/withdraw into a signed FundsApplied event — clever but loses audit distinction. Correct rejection of overdraft.
Category error: uses xstate's CommandHandler + assign, not an event-store CommandHandler. No readStream, no appendToStream, no expectedRevision, no decide. Fundamentally wrong abstraction.

project(state,event) with itemCount floor; extends event shape to include applyCoupon/checkout. Uses CartSummary name (not generic ReadModel). Logic reasonable; default branch returns state unchanged.
Good tradeoffs table. loadAggregate signature is (id, upToVersion) and hydrate merely returns cached if present — no snapshot+delta replay, no evolve. Half the ask is missing.
